summary: Security audit test for FREE11: All 31 tests PASS (1 skipped). Verified 4 critical security fixes: (1) 3 admin endpoints now require auth, (2) product creation admin-only, (3) check-in race condition fixed with atomic MongoDB, (4) rate limiter works without Redis. DB indexes verified. All auth flows working.

minor.issue: Rate limiter test (TestRateLimiter::test_rate_limit_after_failures_http) depletes the auth rate-limit window (AUTH_LIMIT=5 per minute). If the full test suite is run multiple times within the same 60s window, module-scoped token fixtures may get 429 and skip admin-dependent tests. Fixed by: (1) placing rate limiter test LAST, (2) adding unit test for in-memory logic. Note: this is expected security behavior, not a bug.

security_audit_results.Race condition check-in: FIXED – atomic find_one_and_update prevents double check-in ✅
security_audit_results.Redemption insufficient coins: SKIPPED – test user balance >= product cost

critical_code_review_comments: Rate limiter AUTH_LIMIT=5 per minute per IP is quite restrictive for automated testing. When running the full test suite (which makes 5+ auth requests for fixtures + direct login tests), the 6th request gets 429. This is correct production behavior but means test runs must be separated by at least 1 minute. Consider increasing AUTH_LIMIT slightly (e.g., 10) or adding a test-mode bypass.

The `test_redemption_with_insufficient_coins` test is always skipped because the test user (test_redesign_ui26@free11test.com) has a high coin balance. To test this case reliably, create a dedicated test user with near-zero coins.
ProductCreate schema uses `coin_price` field but Product model uses `coins_cost` – potential naming inconsistency between create/read models (not a breaking bug but worth aligning).
seed_data_creation: Admin created TEST_SecurityAuditProduct via POST /api/products during test (persisted in DB)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Security audit complete. All 4 critical fixes verified. Key note: rate limiter depletes 5 auth-request quota per minute per IP – if running test suite multiple times within 1 minute, wait 65s between runs. The test suite is designed to handle this (rate limiter test placed last). Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_security_audit_53.py
